proposed.title: DekBAB 2026 Applications Now Open
proposed.summary: DekBAB is now accepting applications for volunteers to join as Liaisons, Artist Crew, and Docents. Applications are open from 1 July – 1 August 2026.

proposed.title: New Additions to the Artist Line-Up
proposed.summary: New additions to the artist line-up announcement. No specific dates provided, but usually happens in November.

proposed.title: 13th Power & Energy Kenya 2026
proposed.summary: 13th Power & Energy Kenya 2026 is happening on Wed 29 Jul 2026 from 10:00 AM onwards at Carnivore Stage, Nairobi

proposed.title: MOMBASA COLOUR FESTIVAL 2026 3RD EDITION
proposed.summary: There are designated classes, drama workshops, and art events in Mombasa for the same. If you just want to be a mere spectator you can attend theatre events and art exhibitions in Mombasa too.
